title: Diageo’s Learning for Life: Bridging the Skills Gap and Unlocking Opportunities for Nigerian Youths - FinancialEDGE
description: In a bold initiative to address the pressing issue of youth unemployment in Nigeria, Diageo has unveiled the Learning for Life programme, a comprehensive training initiative designed to equip young Nigerians with practical skills needed to succeed in the hospitality industry. At the sidelines of the programme's launch in Lagos, Financial Edge, Odume Festus sat
